objective: Prevent duplicate contact submissions while the request is already in flight so users cannot accidentally create repeated leads with rapid repeated clicks.

functional: Submitting the contact form twice rapidly does not create two independent requests.
The submit affordance communicates the in-flight state clearly until the first request resolves.
The page returns to a valid post-submit state without trapping the user in a disabled form.
ui_checks: The contact form remains usable on /contact after a successful submit.
No console errors appear while the in-flight guard is exercised.
